headline: Online Child Exploitation Takedowns Reach 48,000 Items
context: PDRM and MCMC removed 48,000 pieces of child sexual exploitation material from Malaysian-accessible platforms in 2025.

cards.big: 48,000 child exploitation items removed from Malaysian platforms in 2025
cards.sub: Record enforcement but volume indicates scale of ongoing child safety crisis

cards.big: Arrests for online child exploitation rose to 380 from 220 in 2023
cards.sub: Convicted offenders face 10-30 years under amended Penal Code

cards.big: Interpol identified 1,200 Malaysian IP addresses accessing CSAM in 2025
cards.sub: Cross-referencing led to 85 arrests with 12 also directly abusing children

cards.big: Platform CSAM reporting increased 65% after mandatory reporting law
cards.sub: TikTok alone reported 8,500 suspected items to authorities in 2025

cards.big: CSAM enforcement tests whether detection and prosecution can match the scale of online exploitation
48,000 child exploitation takedowns. Scale of detection reveals scale of the problem, not its resolution.
